content.title: One command, three regions
content.subtitle: The whole release script. JetBrains Mono ships with the navy-blue theme.
content.code:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# 1. Build + tag the image (immutable digest).
IMAGE=ghcr.io/riseup/api:$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 -t "$IMAGE" --push .

# 2. Run dbt models + integration tests (fail-loud).
bun run dbt:build
bun run test:integration

# 3. Roll the three regions in series; each waits on a healthy /readyz.
for region in sin syd nrt; do
  fly deploy --image "$IMAGE" --region "$region" --strategy rolling
  ./scripts/wait-healthy.sh "$region"
done

echo "✓ released $IMAGE"
content.codeCaption: Highlighted lines pulse a warm cyan backdrop on slide enter (suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion).

notes: The four highlighted lines are the moments that matter: image build, dbt build, the rolling per-region loop, and the readiness wait. Use the copy button live if anyone asks for a copy.
